message:
test: pin signal mask conformance via differential harness

Adds tests/conformance_diff_sigprocmask.rs covering 3 functions:
- sigprocmask: cross fl<->lc SIG_SETMASK then read-back, block/unblock
  round-trip across impls, invalid-how edge
- pthread_sigmask: SIG_SETMASK then libc query
- sigpending: block via pthread_sigmask, self-kill, sigpending must
  agree across impls. Uses SIG_IGN to absorb the delivered signal.

6 tests pass, 0 divergences against glibc.

Bead: bd-spmsk1
